name: Artificier

recommended.why: Knight Gear increases Attack, HP and Skill Damage, significantly improving Artificier's turret damage, support abilities and overall battlefield impact.

alternative.why: A solid alternative when Knight Gear is unavailable. The additional HP and Damage Reduction improve Artificier's survivability, allowing her to keep supporting the team throughout longer battles.

investment.why: Artificier is one of the strongest support heroes in League teams. Her turret provides consistent damage while her utility greatly increases the effectiveness of the entire lineup, making her a top priority Mythic investment for end-game League players.

description: Artificier is a Mythic League support hero specializing in sustained damage, utility and battlefield control. Her TH-300 Turret continuously pressures enemies while her abilities strengthen the entire team, making her a cornerstone of nearly every competitive League lineup.
